_comment: ThunderBridge config — DeepSeek official API (Anthropic-native endpoint, passthrough auth).
_prereq: ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN must be set to your DeepSeek API key (in ~/.claude/settings.json env block). Or set DEEPSEEK_API_KEY and change auth to 'Bearer env:DEEPSEEK_API_KEY'.

deepseek-v4-pro-202606._comment: Remap legacy Tencent Cloud model name to DeepSeek official.
